skills.name: diagnose
skills.reason: Optional disciplined diagnosis loop for hard bugs and regressions.

skills.name: tdd
skills.reason: Optional red-green-refactor workflow for tests-first implementation.

skills.name: triage
skills.reason: Optional issue-triage state machine for backlog grooming.

skills.name: to-prd
skills.reason: Optional conversion from conversation context to PRD.

skills.name: to-issues
skills.reason: Optional slicing of plans and PRDs into independently grabbable issues.

skills.name: improve-codebase-architecture
skills.reason: Optional architecture-deepening workflow before broad feature work.

skills.name: review
skills.reason: Absorb the two-axis Standards/Spec review pattern into Loom review gates; upstream is in-progress.

skills.name: design-an-interface
skills.reason: Absorb design-it-twice parallel interface exploration; upstream is deprecated.

skills.name: request-refactor-plan
skills.reason: Absorb tiny-commit refactor planning discipline; upstream is deprecated.

skills.name: qa
skills.reason: Do not vendor by default; GitHub issue QA flow is product-specific and upstream is deprecated.

skills.name: git-guardrails-claude-code
skills.reason: Do not vendor by default; Claude Code hook setup is not a Codex workflow requirement.

skills.name: ce-brainstorm
skills.reason: Prefer installing the full Compound Engineering plugin; this skill depends on the CE workflow shape and optional agents.

skills.name: ce-plan
skills.reason: Prefer installing the full Compound Engineering plugin; absorb the plan-quality bar and route to the installed skill when available.

skills.name: ce-work
skills.reason: Prefer invoking the installed CE execution skill for CE plans; direct vendoring without CE agents loses review and research leverage.

skills.name: ce-code-review
skills.reason: Prefer invoking the installed CE review skill; its strongest behavior relies on the CE reviewer agent set.

skills.name: ce-compound
skills.reason: Prefer invoking the installed CE knowledge-capture skill after verified fixes; keep Loom self-contained when CE is absent.
